sections.paragraph:
Original: זרזיף

Transliteration: zarzı̂yph

Phonetic: zar-zeef'

BDB Definition:

  1. drip (verb)
    1. (Hiphil) to cause to drip
  2. drop, dripping, a soaking, a saturation (noun masculine)

Origin: by reduplication from an unused root meaning to flow

TWOT entry: 584a

Part(s) of speech: Verb
